scope.target: Define dev-workflow ownership, delegation boundaries, and routing behavior.
scope.dependency_radius: Skill registry and existing skill boundaries.
constraints: Do not duplicate downstream skill internals.

user_constraints: The skill should drive other skills instead of mixing all development process rules into root instructions.

results.summary: Defined dev-workflow as a universal orchestration skill for workflow mode decisions, workflow artifacts, skill routing, validation checkpoints, and commit checkpoints without replacing downstream domain skills.
tests_run: Manual comparison against existing canonical skill registry and wrapper patterns
